text: Blistering ransomware attacks Tuesday against companies and agencies across the world disrupted operations at major multinationals. Targets included Maersk, WPP, Rosneft and FedEx. The attack was described as a cyberattack that started in Ukraine before rippling across Europe, driven by data-scrambling software that displayed a ransom screen and demanded Bitcoin payment.
attribution_coding_note: Describes a cyberattack that 'started in Ukraine before rippling across Europe'; no responsible actor named in the stored text.
